channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Yankees kick off opening day with home game against Brewers
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – It's baseball's opening day on Thursday and the New York Yankees are kicking off the season with a home game against the Milwaukee Brewers.
item.dc:creator: Kala Rama, PIX 11

item.title: Jokic gets a triple-double in his return to lead Nuggets past Bucks 127-117
item.description: Nikola Jokic had 39 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists in his first game back in nearly two weeks to lead the Denver Nuggets to a 127-117 victory against the Milwaukee Bucks.
item.dc:creator: Craig Meyer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Baseball: Southwest 7, Crawford 0
item.description: Baseball time on Tuesday afternoon with Crawford hosting Southwest. The Raiders won 7-0. Sebestian Martinez was stellar on the bump for the Raiders complete game shutout scattering five hits with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James beats buzzer with tip to lift Lakers past Pacers and keep record streak alive
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — LeBron James had a buzzer-beating tip-in to cap a 10-point fourth quarter, Luka Doncic scored 34 points and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Indiana Pacers 120-119 on Wednesday night. James extended his NBA-record streak of 10 or more points to 1,283 games — barely.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: TCU's Hailey Van Lith glad to have shared publicly about mental health issues she dealt with in past
item.description: TCU standout guard Hailey Van Lith says it was difficult, but she's glad to have shared publicly about mental health struggles she says she dealt with early in her basketball career.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NFL competition committee proposes moving touchback to 35 and making dynamic kickoff permanent
item.description: The NFL competition committee is recommending making the dynamic kickoff rule permanent and moving touchbacks to the 35-yard line in hopes of generating even more returns.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Newly signed Russell Wilson says he expects to be the Giants' starting QB this upcoming season
item.description: Russell Wilson joined the New York Giants with every intention of being under center when the regular season begins.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: White Sox DFA Oscar Colás, claim switch-hitting outfielder off waivers from Rockies
item.description: The Chicago White Sox designated top prospect Oscar Colás for assignment and claimed switch-hitting outfielder Greg Jones off waivers from the Colorado Rockies, while reassigned five players to minor league camp and optioned right-handed pitcher Justin Anderson to Triple-A.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Vikings want McCarthy as starting QB after tabling Rodgers conversation with never say never
item.description: EAGAN, Minn. (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings have moved forward with a roster revolving around J.J. McCarthy as their starting quarterback and tabled consideration of Aaron Rodgers — even if the door remains open at least a little.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys' Dak Prescott gets caught up in wild trade rumor weeks before draft
item.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott was the subject of a wild trade rumor involving the Cleveland Browns on Wednesday ahead of the NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Major League Cricket coming to Oakland Coliseum
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (KRON) -- In the East Bay, the City of Oakland has announced that Major League Cricket will play matches at the Coliseum this summer. Cricket is the world’s second most popular sport, after soccer.
item.dc:creator: Charles Clifford, KRON4

item.title: USF Football spring game features street fest & halftime alumni game
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The USF Spring Game returns to Corbett Stadium on the USF Campus on Sat., April 26 and will feature a street fest outside the stadium and the always popular alumni flag football game at halftime.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Free-agent fans: Options for forlorn Oakland A’s supporters in search of new team
item.description: For A's fans who can't root for John Fisher's team since he moved it from Oakland to Sacramento -- and eventually Las Vegas -- there are 29 other MLB teams to support
item.dc:creator: Laurence Miedema, The Mercury News

item.title: Steph Curry and Michelle Obama team up to create a sports drink
item.description: The drink, called PLEZi Hydration is available at Amazon and at select grocery stores in California, the home of Curry’s team, the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Basketball legend fires back at 'big dummies' who ignored Caitlin Clark's immediate WNBA impact
item.description: Basketball legend Cheryl Miller hit out at critics who ignored the impact Caitlin Clark made during the 2024 WNBA season and talked about her race.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamont Butler has performed on Final Four stage before. He wants to get back there with a new school
item.description: Lamont Butler doesn’t want to settle for just one shining moment on a Final Four stage. The guy who made the buzzer beater to send San Diego State to the 2023 NCAA Tournament championship game is confident he can get back there as a fifth-year senior with Kentucky.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Argentina secures a World Cup spot and then celebrates it with a 4-1 victory over archrival Brazil
item.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — Defending champion Argentina celebrated throughout Tuesday as the team secured its place at the 2026 World Cup hours before an historic 4-1 win over archrival Brazil.
item.dc:creator: DEBORA REY and MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Testing begins at Cortina's controversial Olympic sliding track for bobsled, luge and skeleton
item.description: ROME (AP) — When Italian skeleton competitor Mattia Gaspari became the first athlete to test the controversial sliding track for next year's Milan-Cortina Winter Olympics, he did so in a sort of tunnel under a temporary roof built of wooden beams and white plastic paper.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers to make Trump White House visit next month
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers plan to visit President Donald Trump at the White House to celebrate their World Series victory, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson is heading to the New York Giants, AP source says
item.description: Russell Wilson has agreed on a one-year contract with the New York Giants, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Warriors' Stephen Curry won't play in Miami, 2nd straight game missed with pelvic contusion
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Stephen Curry is going to take a little more time to heal. Curry remained out of Golden State's lineup Tuesday night for a game against the Miami Heat, the second straight game he has missed with a pelvic contusion.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Colorado State's Niko Medved leaves for Minnesota after 7-year run with Rams
item.description: Niko Medved, the second-winningest coach in Rams' history, has accepted the head coaching job with the Big Ten's Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms his relationship with Vanessa Trump in a social media post
item.description: Tiger Woods has confirmed his relationship with the former daughter-in-law of President Donald Trump, publishing two images to social media in a post that said, “Love is in the air.” Woods and Vanessa Trump, who was married to Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: In March Madness, BYU gets a stop, then gets to go ... to Sweet 16 with 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: The BYU Cougars led the entire game Saturday but still had to make one, final defensive stop against Wisconsin's irrepressible guard, John Tonje, to seal a 91-89 victory over the Badgers and the program's first trip to the Sweet 16 since 2011 — the days of Jimmer Fredette.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers-Cubs opener in Tokyo averages more than 25 million viewers in Japan, a record audience
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tuesday's first game of the Tokyo Series averaged more than 25 million viewers in Japan according to Major League Baseball, making it the most-watched MLB game in the country's history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lakers play the Bulls on 3-game win streak
item.description: Chicago Bulls (30-40, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Los Angeles Lakers (43-25, fourth in the Western Conference) Los Angeles; Saturday, 10:30 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: Los Angeles heads into a matchup with Chicago as winners of three games in a row. The Lakers are 28-7 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
